pageContext.name: Disney Haunted Mansion Salt and Pepper Set
pageContext.description: Enesco's Studio Brands is the one-stop source for quality gifts and Disney collectibles licensed from the world's most innovative and desired entertainment brands while being recognized for value, craftsmanship, and authenticity. This salt and pepper set is inspired by the beloved Disney attraction where guests enter a foreboding estate and watch as the walls stretch and spirits meander. The shakers feature the black and white chamber wallpaper and perusing portraits.
